meaning: n.(古希腊哲学家)苏格拉底的信徒adj.苏格拉底[哲学]的
examples: Actually an idea Aristotle had got from the pre-Socratic philosophers.
We should not be surprised there is no Socratic dialogue with Hippocrates.
Together they formed what we call the Milesian School of Pre-Socratic philosophy.
Techniques being used include Socratic dialogue, role-plays, discussion of exemplars and so-called immersive experiential learning.
Socratic identified the most popular combinations and passed the results to Taco Bell in a few weeks.
